name: This Pet Werewolf Isn't Potty Trained...
description:
⚠️PISS! FECES! FARTS!

You just adopted a werewolf from the pound! And it looks like he is already making a mess...

Sparky is a big tall werewolf who loves to play! Make sure to give him lots of belly rubs! And don't get too friendly, he loves to mark his territory as his own...
